CustomField.description: Widget targeting filter: Event location type preference (Virtual/Online vs. In-Person). Leave blank to show to alumni regardless of event preference. When populated, only alumni whose Event_Location_Type_s__c field contains one of the selected values will see this widget. References the Event_Location_Type global picklist. Source: 2026_PortalUpdates-Widget_Filters.csv
CustomField.label: Filter: Event Location Type
